programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Mifflin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a side trip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Jimbo and Ned's efforts to drive up the ratings for their new hunting show on the cable access channel threatens to edge out an old favourite, 'Jesus and Pals.'

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: Futurama: All the Presidents' Heads

programme.title: Futurama: Cold Warriors

programme.title: Futurama: Overclockwise

programme.title: Futurama: Reincarnation

programme.title: Futurama: The Bots and the Bees
programme.desc: Bender and the office soda machine conceive a mini bot.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park: Going Native
programme.desc: Butters is going on a journey to follow in his Hawaiian ancestors' path.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek x Craig
programme.desc: The Asian girls in school are drawing dreamy pictures of Tweek and Craig.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: When the Gun Goes Bang, Bang, Bang
programme.desc: After an undercover cop working a narcotics-smuggling sting is shot dead, the killers next turn their sites on Boston homicide headquarters, leaving Jane, Maura and Frankie Jr. trapped in a fight for survival.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: We Don't Need Another Hero
programme.desc: Jane is honoured as a hero at a public event but the celebration is short-lived when disaster strikes. The ensuing case reunites Jane with an old high school flame who may be the person she needs to help her heal emotionally.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Movie: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a pushy businesswoman learns that her VISA has run out and she'll be deported back to Canada, she forces her assistant to marry her. Her assistant agrees to the plan, but only if she promises to give him a promotion.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Home Solutions for Unexpected Events
programme.desc: The latest in high tech and discreet hearing aids, finding reliable in-home healthcare, waterline protection policies and restoration after disaster strikes.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Why Try to Change Me Now
programme.desc: The arrival of a new consultant puts all of the doctors on edge, especially once she starts stepping on toes in the OR. Amelia and Owen bring their personal problems into the hospital, while April explores some uncharted territory.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Room Where It Happens
programme.desc: A difficult surgery brings back pivotal memories for Meredith, Richard, Owen and Stephanie, as they work together to save a life.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: You Haven't Done Nothin'
programme.desc: Believing he is going to jail, Alex makes a big decision about his future. While the hospital is overrun with victims of a building collapse, Richard demands answers from Bailey about Eliza's presence at Grey Sloan.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: You Can Look (But You'd Better Not Touch)
programme.desc: Bailey, Arizona and Jo go to a maximum security women's prison to treat a violent, 16-year-old pregnant girl and her unborn baby.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Jukebox Hero
programme.desc: Richard and the attendings set out to make Eliza's first day at Grey Sloan a bumpy one. Meanwhile, Meredith tries to track down Alex.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: None of Your Business
programme.desc: Maggie gets a surprise visit from her mother at the hospital. Bailey has to make a difficult decision when one of the attendings refuses to work with Eliza, and Stephanie gets caught up in Owen and Amelia's personal drama.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: It Only Gets Much Worse
programme.desc: The residents are excited for Eliza's next phase of teaching, but they spend the day caught between the warring attendings. Meanwhile, April has a challenging first day in her new role at the hospital.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Back Where You Belong
programme.desc: Alex returns to the hospital and discovers a lot has changed since he left. Meanwhile, Jo has to make a difficult decision on a case, and Arizona tries to distance herself from Eliza.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Civil War
programme.desc: Richard, Jackson, April and Catherine tackle a grueling trauma case intensified by hospital politics. Amelia finally faces her feelings about Owen, and Meredith gets caught between Nathan and Alex over a patient.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Season 2 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: See what new forensic mysteries are unsolved, and experience the forensic fandom frenzy from the upcoming season. Forensic Files II Season 2 premieres on HLN Sunday, July 11, at 10pm ET/PT.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: A Golden Opportunity (Part 1 of 2)
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue the Kramers in Alaska by converting an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is suddenly forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty must finish alone, leading to the discovery of the homestead's biggest resource: gold.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: A Golden Opportunity (Part 2 of 2)
programme.desc: The Raneys convert an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen for Alaskan homesteaders. But when Marty must quarantine, Matt and Misty must finish alone, leading to the discovery of the homestead's biggest resource: gold.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Stuck in the Mud
programme.desc: Misty and Matt find themselves alone on a critical rescue of Alaskan homesteaders ill from dirty water and stuck in a crumbling cabin. It's all-hands-on-deck as the Raneys call in family reinforcements to bring all new ingenuity to save the day.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Arkansas Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A musician and college student wants an off-the-grid treehouse compound with three structures, each serving living and sustainability, in the Arkansas woods. Water and supply issues will make getting it done in 30 days tough, even with his father's help.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Island of Death
programme.desc: Jake gets his chance at redemption on Death Island.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Mayan Sacrifice
programme.desc: Yucatan water caves become John's labyrinth of doom.

programme.title: WWII's Great Escapes: Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous trails out of Nazi-occupied France, taking him through the valleys and passes of the Pyrenees mountain range and into Spain.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves on a deserted island off the coast of Nova Scotia, in the middle of winter. They have only a few items with them for survival, some knives and an emergency blanket, and they need to build a shelter.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Panic in the Jungle
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on a lost hiker scenario in the sweltering jungles of Laos. The two must bushwhack their way through dense terrain equipped with items a backpacker might carry: a 35 mm camera, condoms and a pack of cigarettes.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No Man Is an Island
programme.desc: Joe sets-off on a mission to locate his new partner, who is on an uninhabited island off the coast of Panama. Using his tracking skills, Joe locates Matt Graham and together they face their first survival situation: getting off of a remote Pacific island.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On the Edge
programme.desc: Lost on a perilous ridgeline, at 15,000 feet above sea level, Joe and Matt are forced to descend slippery cliffs through extreme weather conditions, where altitude sickness and hypothermia threaten, and life-preserving fire eludes them.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mayan Mayhem
programme.desc: Trapped in a labyrinth of underground tunnels, Joe and Matt facedown darkness and risk drowning only to emerge on surface and find an inhospitable jungle. Their opposing approaches to survival pit them against one another before bringing them to rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: One Shot, One Kill
programme.desc: Lost in a land that time forgot, New Zealand's Fiordland, Joe and Matt face a seemingly ordinary scenario of two hunters following their target into unfamiliar territory, but this time, they've only got one chance to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: End of the Road
programme.desc: Stranded deep in the jungle of Vietnam, Joe and Matt take on a real world survival scenario in untamed terrain, but even their expertise can't change the fact that they're up against the hottest and most humid month of the year in South East Asia.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Himalayan Hardship
programme.desc: In the Himalayas, Joe seeks rescue from the rocky terrain, dense forest, and animal threats while Matt seems more interested in achieving spiritual enlightenment than getting out alive.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Arizona Crush
programme.desc: In Arizona, Dave spots a clue that could be evidence of main channel gold before leaving for to an epic prospect in Alaska. But when Jason decides to move the crew off questionable pay, the pressure is on to hit their weekly target.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Leneatha's Story
programme.desc: For 23 years, Leneatha has worked as a pharmacy tech at a local hospital. Now, she has a young daughter to support, but she's so big that it's hard to move. If Dr. Now can't help her stop eating, losing her job could be the least of her worries.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cyster, Cyster
programme.desc: Yaellie, a sweet 9-year-old, has itchy psoriasis on over 90 percent of her body. Matt, a former Marine, has a large recurring lump in his armpit. Twins Tracie and Stacie have numerous matching bumps on their heads that sometimes leak.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Seana's Story
programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house. She is depressed and anxious and her weight-gain threatens to take her last breath. Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but Seana.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Kings: The Moment of Truth
programme.desc: It's the moment of truth as Casey learns if he has been approved for life-saving surgery. Amanda has huge news regarding her cancer. Amy attempts a hellacious Spartan Race. The King family throws a party to reveal their shocking new looks.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cyster, Cyster
programme.desc: Yaellie, a sweet 9-year-old, has itchy psoriasis on over 90 percent of her body. Matt, a former Marine, has a large recurring lump in his armpit. Twins Tracie and Stacie have numerous matching bumps on their heads that sometimes leak.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Seana's Story
programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house. She is depressed and anxious and her weight-gain threatens to take her last breath. Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but Seana.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Kings: The Moment of Truth
programme.desc: It's the moment of truth as Casey learns if he has been approved for life-saving surgery. Amanda has huge news regarding her cancer. Amy attempts a hellacious Spartan Race. The King family throws a party to reveal their shocking new looks.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: I Gotta Have Faith
programme.desc: The Merrifields head to Mexico to reunite with fiancee Roberta. The plot thickens as the Snowdens reveal a new twist in their world. Rather than search online, the Joneses go out on the town. Life in the Winder home is looking very different these days.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Emotions and Commotions
programme.desc: The Snowdens welcome a new girlfriend! The Merrifields scout wedding venues with Roberta, leaving Dannielle to feel like a third wheel. The Clarks work on their relationship with explosive results. The Winders' family members question their lifestyle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady
programme.desc: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to prove he's back as a bridal designer for good.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Seven People With Seven Opinions
programme.desc: Super fan TK brings seven of her closest friends to help her choose her dress. Actress Leslie has an unlimited budget, but she refuses to believe her opinionated mom chose the perfect wedding gown on the very first try.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hell Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's a family affair as the sister of star NBA player Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress. Cami Lee is back with her over the top mom who will stop at nothing to make sure Cami doesn't get a black dress, including hunting Randy down for help.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Don't Show the Goodies
programme.desc: Stephanie has a big budget and wants a show-stopper dress for her second marriage. Courtney Burson is back and she may have finally made up her mind about a dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Purple Unicorn
programme.desc: Bride Nik, rock star and former bass player for Prince, needs a one-of-a-kind dress for her aerial wedding ceremony. Teddi's wedding is only a few months away, see if this daddy's girls dress will be ready in time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Morticia Addams in a Good Way
programme.desc: Designer Hayley Paige drops in to help a bride who wants to look like a creepy fairy to match her skull centrepieces on her wedding day. With more than 150 discarded dresses, Rachael is a bride with a penchant for pickiness.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not with Those Chubby Arms

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: The Greek Goddess and the Giant Gown

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Rituals, Rules and the Ultimate Gypsy Test

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Mama Said Knock You Out

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: You Don't Know Gypsy!
programme.desc: Wannabe Gypsy bride Sabrina must prove herself to the Gypsy community by undergoing a humiliating ancient trial. Traditions and rituals are an integral part of Gypsy life today, and when Gypsies break the code, there's usually hell to pay.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Hard Jay's Night
programme.desc: Mitch struggles to hide his true feelings about the unflattering wedding topper Cam's father whittled out of soap for them. Phil tries to help Gloria sell her pre-Jay apartment, but they get sidetracked at the neighbourhood salon.

programme.title: Modern Family: Australia
programme.desc: The entire family tags along as Phil fulfills his mom's wish for him to return to his roots and visit the country where he was conceived: Australia. Unfortunately, Phil's attempts to embrace his native land are met by a lot of rejection.

programme.title: Modern Family: Sleeper
programme.desc: Phil fails at his task to stay home and wait for the repairman, forcing him to tell an elaborate lie to hide the truth from Claire, but the stress is more than he can physically handle. Meanwhile, Gloria is responsible for organizing the family portrait.

programme.title: Modern Family: Message Received
programme.desc: Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge each other to step outside their comfort zone and try something new. Mitch and Cam's wedding is getting too big and costly, so they resort to selling a couple of their prized possessions.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam’s big day is finally here and nothing can ruin it, until nothing turns into a whole lot of somethings and puts wedding planner extraordinaire Pepper Saltzman to the test. Jay and Gloria host the Tuckers. Phil squeezes in an eye procedure.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding day chaos continues as the entire party shifts from one contingency plan to another. Guests start to get testy, Mitchell and Cameron are feeling discouraged and poor Claire shows physical wear and tear.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Long Honeymoon
programme.desc: This summer has been exceptionally blissful in the Dunphy house. Alex is away on a humanitarian trip and the rest of the family is getting along swimmingly, but when Alex comes home, there is an immediate shift in mood.

programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Vogue Idea
programme.desc: Carrie begins her new job at Vogue; Charlotte hosts Miranda's baby shower.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Heart NY
programme.desc: Carrie becomes nostalgic about her relationship with Mr. Big and the city she loves.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Anchors Away
programme.desc: The girls try to come to terms with Miranda's new life with Brady; Carrie meets a sailor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Unoriginal Sin

programme.title: Sex and the City: Luck Be an Old Lady
programme.desc: The girls head to Atlantic City for a 'girls' weekend; Samantha can't trust Richard.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cover Girl
programme.desc: Samantha offers to help Carrie with her book cover; Charlotte shops on-line.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: MILFs Gone Wild

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cheers to That!
programme.desc: Kim's confidence is still shaken up from the Mexico trip. Khloe wants mother-daughter bonding time and isn't impressed when Kris has no time for it. Kourtney is keeping her dating life on the down low.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Clothes Quarters
programme.desc: Kourtney plans a fun sister getaway to bond with Kendall, but is distracted by news of Scott's destructive behavior at home. Later, Kim stages an unwelcome intervention on Khloé's wardrobe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Catch Me If You Cannes
programme.desc: Scott threatens to ruin Kourtney's trip to Cannes. Kim struggles to set clear boundaries with her assistant and the girls get educated about Planned Parenthood.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fan Friction
programme.desc: Khloe fears that Cleveland fans may turn on her family. Kim gets fed up with her lack of willpower and makes a drastic lifestyle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Close to Home
programme.desc: Kim is shocked to learn about the rising rate of homelessness in LA and sets out to bring awareness to the growing crisis. Meanwhile Kris hires a scribe to document her every word.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Dog Tired
programme.desc: Khloé and Kendall consider getting guns for protection, Kris imposes strict guidelines for her mom to follow in her new condo, and later Kim can't handle her new rambunctious puppy.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Zooey Deschanel spills dating secrets and Jason Sudeikis stops by to talk 'Ted Lasso' and more.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do Not Push
programme.desc: It's Jay and Gloria's anniversary and they can't seem to get on the same page on what kind of gift to give; sentimental or expensive. And, the Dunphys head to Caltech for Alex's college tour.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cold
programme.desc: Phil is putting together Mitch and Cam's wedding video for a special family screening, but when the footage reveals that he is responsible for a horrible cold that has plagued the family, he must do some creative editing.

programme.title: Modern Family: Marco Polo
programme.desc: The Dunphys move into a cramped hotel room while their house is getting treated for mold, which Phil sees as an opportunity to spend some quality time together, but Claire and the kids are less than enthused.

programme.title: Modern Family: Won't You Be Our Neighbor
programme.desc: Phil is selling the house next door and he and Claire are excited by the prospect of having wonderful new neighbours, but that quickly turns into panic when a loud and obnoxious couple come to look at the house.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 3: AwesomeLand
programme.desc: Even though Halloween is Claire's holiday, she allows Phil to take over this year so instead of her usual fright-fest theme, he decides to turn the house into AwesomeLand.

programme.title: Modern Family: Queer Eyes, Full Hearts
programme.desc: Phil and Claire don't know if they should be happy or concerned that Haley and Andy are spending a lot of time together, however, they soon find things are not what they appear.

programme.title: Modern Family: Three Turkeys
programme.desc: Phil is cooking Thanksgiving dinner this year with Luke as his sous chef, but Claire has no confidence in them and prepares a secret turkey of her own as backup.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers in the Night
programme.desc: When Alex tells Phil and Claire she has a boyfriend, they worry they’ve put too much pressure on her and has made up an imaginary boyfriend.

programme.title: Modern Family: Haley's 21st Birthday
programme.desc: Haley's turning 21 and the family is taking her to a bar to celebrate. Claire really wants Haley to start seeing her as a friend rather than her uptight mom, and Mitch and Cam make the sad realization that they may not be as cool as they thought.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day We Almost Died
programme.desc: While driving out to get breakfast, the Dunphys including Manny have a near death experience causing everyone to reevaluate their lives.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Who's Got This in the Bag?
programme.desc: It's personal for Maine restaurateur Mark Gaier, who's here to redeem his partner's prior loss to Bobby Flay, but chef and caterer Christopher Covelli isn't going down without a fight.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: East Coast's Finest
programme.desc: Celebrity chef and author Curtis Stone teams up with Michael Symon to rattle Bobby. Rhode Island's Chef Antonio Franco goes head-to-head against New York Chef Luke Venner for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rules are Meant to be Broken
programme.desc: 'Chopped' host Ted Allen and comedian Margaret Cho don't play by the rules when it comes to taking down Bobby Flay. To do their dirty work, they've brought in renegade chefs Diane DiMeo and Ian Russo to put culinary golden boy Bobby in his place.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Green, White and Red
programme.desc: Little Italy is in the house when Naples-born Raffaele Ronca goes up against Italian expert Ken Vedrinski. Food Network veterans Anne Burrell and Scott Conant bring their expertise to the arena to get Bobby Flay beat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Cream Of The Crop
programme.desc: The kitchen comes alive when Food Network's Katie Lee and Valerie Bertinelli team up to see Bobby Flay fall. It's up to them to make the call when Chef Chris Henry from Massachusetts battles Buffalo, N.Y.'s Chef Steve Gedra for a chance at the champ!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Lady Butchers
programme.desc: Meat enthusiast Courtney Rada and Iron Chef Michael Symon source Cleveland chefs Penny Barend and Melissa Khoury to bring Bobby Flay down. These lady butchers are ready to slice and dice the competition.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Be Salty
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a dangerous wager with The Kitchen's Geoffrey Zakarian and Sunny Anderson that may cost him the game. Chefs Sammy Monsour and Whitney Thomas are there to rub salt in the wound and try to walk away with a win.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Irish Eyes Are Frowning
programme.desc: Katie has bitten off more than she can chew at Grille No. 13 in Waldorf, Md. She's $350,000 in debt and has no time to spend with her infant daughter. Robert Irvine must teach Katie to work smarter if he's going to save this Irish pub.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Game Day BBQ
programme.desc: The teams celebrate a classic BBQ tradition: tailgating. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson mentor their pitmasters as they explore BBQ that brings folks together to fire up their team spirit and their taste buds.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mazel Tov
programme.desc: Alex Reznik brings his kosher cuisine against Reno, Nev.'s Colin Smith in this battle for bragging rights. Iron Chef Michael Symon and soap star Susan Lucci bring the drama and the heat to take Bobby Flay down!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surprise Surprise!
programme.desc: The Windy City's Pat Sheerin and Chinese-American caterer Katie Chin are hoping that what they've got up their sleeves will be enough to send Bobby Flay packing.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Lady Butchers
programme.desc: Meat enthusiast Courtney Rada and Iron Chef Michael Symon source Cleveland chefs Penny Barend and Melissa Khoury to bring Bobby Flay down. These lady butchers are ready to slice and dice the competition.

programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a dangerous wager with The Kitchen's Geoffrey Zakarian and Sunny Anderson that may cost him the game. Chefs Sammy Monsour and Whitney Thomas are there to rub salt in the wound and try to walk away with a win.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Irish Eyes Are Frowning

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call as captains and crew brace for the loss of friends during a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard at the Russian line, and the clock is ticking for Wild Bill and Junior during the cod derby.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: The Wizard catches fire in a violent storm known as a bomb cyclone. Josh and Casey attempt to fish in 30-foot seas, while two rogue waves slam the Southern Wind. Wild Bill grinds his crew 72 straight hours bringing himself to the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Ice Breaker

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance

programme.desc: A family in Independence, OH who run a hope center want to build a therapeutic space in the trees. Believing in the healing power of trees and treehouses, Pete builds a butterfly-themed treehouse in a cluster of 6 trees featuring a climbing net and loft.

programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.desc: A couple that moved frequently their whole lives made it a habit to never fully unpack at each new home so when they needed an item they couldn't find, they just bought a new one. As a result, they've amassed a lot of things they don't need.

programme.desc: Stephanie and Travis like to hide their mess which translates to stuffed cabinets and closets piled up to eye level with belongings. Meanwhile, Brandi and Tim are overwhelmed with how to even create order in their space.

programme.title: Good Bones: An Office Becomes a Home
programme.desc: Mina and Karen transform a run-down office space into a beautiful home.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Presidents

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysterious Places

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Watcher
programme.desc: Lauren Giddings was smart, charismatic and a newly-minted law school graduate. She had dreams of becoming a public defender, then she was brutally murdered. Her killer tried to pull off the perfect crime, but a secret recording exposed the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Landing
programme.desc: Heather Elvis was a young woman eager to make her mark on the world. Then she disappeared. Investigators discovered a love triangle and thought they had their motive. But there was a question the Elvis family still needed answered: Where was Heather?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Evil to Come
programme.desc: She was a wealthy, beloved socialite in the suburbs of New York City and an unlikely target for such a brutal murder. Police immediately zeroed in on the most likely suspect but solving this crime wouldn’t be easy or quick.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: After college student Angie Samota was stabbed to death, police had no shortage of suspects. A crucial clue narrowed their list to one name, but it would be years before technology and a tenacious friend came together to help unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton was a single mom who fell hard for Andre Jackson, a single dad raising his two kids. The couple married and seemed happy. Then Marie vanished and investigators discovered secrets. Was her disappearance related to her undercover job?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: Connie and Larry Hoagland built a life centered on faith and family. Then, a vicious attack threatened it all. Someone wanted Connie dead. But who? After a bomb exploded underneath her car, secrets started to emerge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson always put her kids first. When she vanished without a word, her loved ones were frantic. Police discovered dark secrets in Sandi's marriage and several men in her life. Which one of them had something to hide?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that led to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Dial 911 for Murder
programme.desc: 21 year-old hopeful romantic, Landy Martinez, is caught in a tumultuous and deadly love triangle. At the scene of the crime is a cell phone with the victim on video pleading for his life. Can the police unlock the evidence to convict the killer?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Vanished with the Tides
programme.desc: A Florida man's body washes ashore on idyllic Cocoa Beach, the apparent victim of an accidental drowning. But as investigators pull back the layers of the victim's personal life, a far murkier truth is revealed.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dark Echoes
programme.desc: A weekend trip to an Alaskan lodge turns deadly for a young mother when she's shot and killed by her boyfriend. The death is ruled an accident and the case is closed until an eerily similar incident in Montana drives investigators to reopen the case.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Relentless
programme.desc: A Texas woman's apparent suicide devastates the family that she leaves behind. But after one investigator dedicates decades to solving the mystery of what drove her to make such a tragic decision, a truth that is far more sinister is discovered.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Snitch
programme.desc: While investigating a drug related homicide, Intelligence is stonewalled by the 'no snitch' culture of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Home
programme.desc: When Intelligence busts a meth lab run by gang leader Marshall Carter, they uncover a rehoming scam in which children adopted from foreign countries are abandoned, then sold online.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While He Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When Eric Somuah was found shot in his bed, it was hard to imagine who would want the outgoing salesman dead. One dogged detective refused to give up. His investigation put him on a path filled with twists, turns and an ending few saw coming.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Inside Job

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hollywood vs. Nazis
programme.desc: A war-torn Italian ghost town immortalized by a legendary Hollywood director blurs the lines between fiction and reality; experts investigate and uncover a forgotten landscape of ruins captured in a WWII documentary.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Ghost Tower
programme.desc: A breathtaking stainless steel tower seems otherworldly and out of place in the remote mountain forests of Croatia. Experts investigate and uncover a dark past of Nazi-led conflict and a monument to a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Piltdown Man
programme.desc: The archaeological world is fooled for nearly half a century when an ape-like skull that's claimed as solid evidence for Darwin's theory of human evolution is proven fake. Using new research, experts investigate and uncover the identity of the forger.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Minoan Enigma Relic
programme.desc: A strange 3,000-year-old relic found in an ancient Minoan palace is marked with enigmatic images that no one has ever managed to decode, but now, using cutting-edge technology, experts might finally reveal its secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Ghost Tower
programme.desc: A breathtaking stainless steel tower seems otherworldly and out of place in the remote mountain forests of Croatia. Experts investigate and uncover a dark past of Nazi-led conflict and a monument to a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Curse of the Piltdown Man
programme.desc: The archaeological world is fooled for nearly half a century when an ape-like skull that's claimed as solid evidence for Darwin's theory of human evolution is proven fake. Using new research, experts investigate and uncover the identity of the forger.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Minoan Enigma Relic
programme.desc: A strange 3,000-year-old relic found in an ancient Minoan palace is marked with enigmatic images that no one has ever managed to decode, but now, using cutting-edge technology, experts might finally reveal its secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hollywood vs. Nazis
programme.desc: A war-torn Italian ghost town immortalized by a legendary Hollywood director blurs the lines between fiction and reality; experts investigate and uncover a forgotten landscape of ruins captured in a WWII documentary.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Alchemists
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Nicolas Flamel and John Dee were alchemists that had a profound effect on the world. Find out if they were clever deceivers or if they really could perform miracles.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Law and Disorder
programme.desc: A former cop moves into a close-knit neighbourhood. Conflict soon arises with the whole community over dogs, noise, and other disturbances that keep piling on and ratcheting up until a boiling point is reached, guns are drawn, and blood is spilled.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: On a quiet cul de sac, a contractor helps his neighbour rent the home beside him, unwittingly trapping himself between an increasingly unhinged presence on one side and the man's hostile parents on the other. It's a conflict that will end in bloodshed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill Their Creators
programme.desc: Extraordinary cases of women who repay a parent's unconditional love with cold-hearted betrayal.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: On a quiet cul de sac, a contractor helps his neighbour rent the home beside him, unwittingly trapping himself between an increasingly unhinged presence on one side and the man's hostile parents on the other. It's a conflict that will end in bloodshed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill Their Creators
programme.desc: Extraordinary cases of women who repay a parent's unconditional love with cold-hearted betrayal.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Kill Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: In Lauderdale Lakes, Florida, a single man moves into his dream home beside a single woman who is looking to start a romantic relationship with him. When he rejects her, bitter animosity ensues, followed by mutual sabotage and, eventually, gunfire.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Capitol Offense
programme.desc: A mysterious figure threatens to expose the secret affair between two married politicians. Despite an outrageous cover up attempt, the situation spirals into a major public scandal, which ultimately derails multiple political careers.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Would You Kill for Love
programme.desc: Jens Soering confessed he murdered his girlfriend's parents. But did he act alone? Was he swayed by devotion to the woman he loved? Or was he so bewitched he confessed to a crime he didn't commit? 30 years later he's hoping new evidence will set him free.

programme.title: Killer in Question: The Bingo Queen
programme.desc: On an early morning in 1997, Angie Nihoff is horrified to find her grandmother, Olga Parlante, murdered in her Florida apartment. The next 15 years will pull the family apart as members of the Parlante clan think one of their own kin is a killer.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Whispers from the Woods
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania town is consumed with suspicion after 19-year-old Erica Miller disappears without a trace. Her mother posts flyers around town, prompting one resident to question the strange behavior of a family friend.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stalked
programme.desc: 26-year-old Florence Ballino is found dead in her apartment in an unusual condition. Her attacker deliberately left behind clues in an attempt to confuse investigators. Detective Postiglione identifies one clue that inextricably connects to the killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Disappeared: Love Triangle
programme.desc: Waitress Brandy Hanna leaves work Friday afternoon for a weekend off. But Monday morning, when she doesn't show up for work, her mother is convinced Brandy is in trouble.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Handsome Devil
programme.desc: Kenia Monge spends her week days studying and her weekends partying with friends. When she disappears from a downtown Denver nightclub after a night of drinking and dancing, Kenia wanders the streets without purse or phone and encounters a man with a van.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Secrets
programme.desc: From the Great Phenol Plot of WWI to the D-Day deception Operation Fortitude, and from the world's first large-scale cyberattack to the greatest counterfeiting scheme in history, learn about the greatest secrets of warfare of the last century.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Dallas Stoudemire: The Hero of El Paso

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Israel
programme.desc: Travel to the Middle East to uncover the very latest weapons being designed for the Israel Defence Forces.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Tiers
programme.desc: A Texas couple building their dream home wants a pool with one-of-a-kind architecture that's also kid-friendly for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pools and Greens Make Happy Teens
programme.desc: A couple wants to keep their two golf-obsessed teenage sons and their friends busy in the yard, and a pool with a putting and chipping green attached is the perfect setup.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Home Needs Dream Pool
programme.desc: The Caviness family build spectacular over-the-top pools.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.desc: Hipster pals, Jonathan and Elise take on experienced Upcyclers, husband and wife, John and Sarah.

programme.desc: Experienced flippers, Brenda and Mark are ready to take on designing sweethearts, Lauren and Ben.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Flipping Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashionable upcyclers, Jenn and Julissa, face off against drinking buddies, TomTom and Gina.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Super Flippers!
programme.desc: Designing friends, Dani and Mo (aka the Wonder Twins), put their heroic flipping powers to the test against the Dynamic Duo of James and Delilah.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Family Flippers
programme.desc: Family pride is on the line when mother/ daughter flippers Leigh and Katey go toe-to-toe against father/ son duo Max and Chris.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Out of Date in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: With two active children and busy jobs, Stacey and Doug are hoping to find a beach house in the Outer Banks of North Carolina to give their family a place to relax and recharge. They find a home, but it must be renovated from top to bottom.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: Spice of Life: The Red Gold of Ethiopia
programme.desc: Known as the Red Gold of Ethiopia, the spice blend berbere is the culinary backbone of many Ethiopian dishes. Hawa Hassan visits Brooklyn's Ghenet restaurant for Injera and Doro Wett (also known as Doro Wat) and creates berbere-infused halibut tibs.

programme.title: Spice of Life: Nigeria's National Spice
programme.desc: Hawa Hassan explores the beloved Nigerian street food Suya, a grilled meat dish flavored by a peanut-based spice of the same name. Inspired by a visit to Chef Hema Agwu in Brooklyn, Hawa uses Suya in her peanut soup with chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Palm Springs
programme.desc: Andrew spotlights the desert oasis of Palm Springs, CA. The sunny resort city features new and iconic spots serving up eats like grilled rib eye and bone marrow butter, the popular reuben stacker and the classic date milkshake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Alaska's Inside Passage
programme.desc: Andrew gets a whole new taste of Alaska when he visits the Inside Passage. Andrew finds out that people in this part of Alaska are still making the most of the bounty that nature has provided. He tries sea cucumbers, salmon eggs, and roasted fish heads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Tears are shed as things get off to a smoky start in the Wildfire round. The Crossfire round sees the chefs fishing for a win. In the Feast of Fire, it's a BBQ battle of Superfoods for the title of Fire Masters Champion.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
