programme.title: Movie: Battleship
programme.desc: The fate of the Earth hangs in the balance as a fleet of naval ships are forced into a battle with an alien armada. Cut off from reinforcements, they must survive on wits and a strategic attack pattern if they are to survive.

programme.title: Movie: CHiPS

programme.title: Movie: Human Capital
programme.desc: Two families' histories collide when their children begin to date. After the young couple gets into a horrific accident, their conflicts reach a boiling point.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunt
programme.desc: Twelve strangers wake up, bound, in the middle of a secluded clearing. Before they're able to wonder how they got there, guns ring and they are forced to find their way through the most sadistic game of all.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Snake Eyes
programme.desc: After witnessing the assassination of the Defence Secretary, a police officer uncovers a conspiracy that implicates high-ranking officials.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo

programme.desc: A would-be hockey player brings his slap shot and unsportsmanlike attitude to the golf course.

programme.desc: A computer genius takes over a cruise ship and sets it on a course for destruction.

programme.title: Movie: Too Fast Too Furious
programme.desc: An officer, stripped of his badge, is recruited to infiltrate an illegal Miami street racing circuit in an effort to redeem himself.

programme.title: Movie: TINA
programme.desc: 'TINA' presents an unvarnished and dynamic account of the life and career of music icon Tina Turner.

programme.title: Movie: Antwone Fisher
programme.desc: Due to a habit of starting violent altercations, a young Navy man is forced to see a psychiatrist after an outburst against a crewman. He eventually reveals a traumatic childhood and learns to overcome his painful past in a quest to find his family.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy
programme.desc: Adventurers inadvertently resurrect a malevolent force with unspeakable power.

programme.title: The Cypher
programme.desc: A young man competes at a freestyle rap competition in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Movie: Don't Let Go
programme.desc: A man's entire family is murdered. However, he continues to receive calls from his dead niece. Unsure of whether it is her ghost or a version of her from the past, he tries to reverse her tragic fate.

programme.title: Movie: Cloud Atlas
programme.desc: Past, present and future meld into one, as a cast of eclectic characters across time find their actions, whether they are good or evil, will cause a rippling affect that will shape the future for centuries to come.

programme.title: Movie: The One and Only Dick Gregory
programme.desc: Stunning archival footage and contemporary interviews help take a closer look at comedian Dick Gregory's legacy. Documenting his personal reinventions, while also hearing from entertainers who have been inspired by his blueprint.

programme.title: Movie: Django Unchained
programme.desc: A slave teams up with a bounty hunter and sets out to save his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

programme.title: Desus & Mero: MAD HABITAT
programme.desc: Desus and Mero welcome Benny Blanco.

programme.title: Movie: 21 Bridges
programme.desc: In an attempt to capture ruthless cop killers, an NYPD detective shuts down the city's bridges.

programme.title: Desus & Mero: MAD HABITAT
programme.desc: Desus and Mero welcome Benny Blanco.

programme.title: Movie: Secretary
programme.desc: Fresh out of a mental hospital, a young lady finds work as a secretary to a rather demanding lawyer. When she realizes they are both attracted to each other, their professional relationship soon turns into a sadomasochistic one.

programme.title: Movie: A Call to Spy
programme.desc: A desperate Winston Churchill orders his new spy agency to recruit and train women as spies in the early days of WWII, leading a trio of female agents to go undercover in France. Risking their lives to build a resistance movement and sabotage the Nazis.

programme.title: Movie: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: A U.S. Secret Service agent, who was unable to prevent Kennedy's murder, vows to stop a madman who plans to assassinate the president.

programme.title: Movie: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A teenager learns that her missing father used their home as collateral for his bail. Knowing her father is involved in drug trafficking, she searches for him in order to keep her family together.

programme.title: Movie: Regarding Henry
programme.desc: A cold-hearted lawyer gets an awakening during his recovery from a shooting.

programme.title: Movie: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A singer-turned-actress falls in love with her bodyguard while being stalked by a fan.

programme.title: Movie: Moneyball
programme.desc: The story of Billy Beane's attempt to put together a baseball team using computer generated analysis.

programme.title: Movie: The Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: A white man and the Native family that adopted him escort two British women through the violent turmoil of the 1757 French and Indian War.

programme.title: Movie: After Earth
programme.desc: A young boy travels across the now abandoned planet Earth in search of a rescue beacon to save his father's life.

programme.title: Movie: Panic Room
programme.desc: Meg Altman moves with her teenage daughter into a New York City brownstone equipped with a highly secure panic room. When a trio of burglars invade the house, they soon find out that what the intruders want is locked inside the panic room with them.

programme.title: Little Birds
programme.desc: Lucy meets up with Bill, he tells her he's an artist, but really he's undercover with the CIA.

programme.title: Movie: Fever Pitch
programme.desc: One winter, Lindsey begins dating Ben, a schoolteacher. Trouble arises in their relationship with the advent of spring, when Lindsey discovers that Ben is an obsessed Boston Red Sox fan and is unable to balance his love for the game with his love for her.

programme.title: Movie: The Eagle
programme.desc: A Roman soldier is determined to honour his dead father's memory by retrieving a lost family emblem.

programme.title: Movie: Natural Born Killers
programme.desc: Two savage, lost souls embark on a merciless killing spree across America's Southwest.

programme.title: Movie: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: A career soldier is forced to choose between following orders and saving lives.

programme.title: Movie: Country Strong
programme.desc: An up-and-coming songwriter befriends a country music legend who has fallen on hard times. Working together to mount her comeback causes trouble in the star's marriage and personal life.

programme.title: Movie: After Earth
programme.desc: A young boy travels across the now abandoned planet Earth in search of a rescue beacon to save his father's life.

programme.title: Movie: Land of the Lost

programme.desc: Follow the students and faculty of Atlanta's most cutthroat performing arts school.

programme.desc: A bakery owner is enchanted by a mystery client whom she has never met.

programme.title: Movie: One Starry Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Home for Christmas Day

programme.desc: Washington's top journalists analyze the week's top news stories and their effects.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: NASA Administrator Bill Nelson discusses America's mission to return to the moon and reach Mars, billionaires in space, unidentified aerial phenomena (UAP) sightings, and NASA's search for intelligent life in the universe.

programme.title: Great Performances: Gloria Estefan: Sangre Yoruba
programme.desc: Adventure through three of Brazil's most influential cities with the GRAMMY Award-winning singer as she explores the origins of its music through its people and offers an inside look at the creation of her new Brazilian-influenced album.

programme.title: Beyond the Canvas: Modern Mexico
programme.desc: Hear from some of Mexico's most prominent figures as they highlight their country's emergence as a global arts center and share updates on how some of Mexico's creative innovators are surviving amid the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: POV: The Neutral Ground

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Recut: Newport 6
programme.desc: Wrap up Roadshow's historic visit to Rosecliff mansion, filled with next-level Newport finds such as 1958 & 1960 M.C. Escher lithographs, a gold & amethyst necklace and a 2003 Sam Zell automaton.

programme.title: The Chavis Chronicles

programme.title: Classical Stretch: By Essentrics: Toning the Waist

programme.title: Arthur: Lights, Camera ... Opera!/ All Worked Up

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Busy Beaver/ The Night Waters

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After realizing that Bella would be safer with them out of the picture, the Cullen's leave town. Heartbroken, Bella turns to Jacob for comfort and friendship, but quickly learns that Jacob is keeping a secret of his own.

programme.title: Backyard Bar Wars: Magician's Lair vs. Village Bunker Bar
programme.desc: An amateur magician aims to be Party King of the Block.

programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla

programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit and run, the team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or her role as a foster mother to two brothers. Also, Lasalle grows increasingly concerned for his brother's welfare.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Wham, Bam, Thank You, Mammy
programme.desc: Blanche's childhood nanny reappears and reveals a surprise about Blanche's father.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Feelings
programme.desc: Dorothy resists pressure to pass a failing student-athlete and Rose accuses her dentist.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again
programme.desc: Sophia tries once again to dissuade Dorothy from reconciling with her ex-husband Stan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: How Do You Solve a Problem Like Sophia
programme.desc: Sophia decides to join a convent after her favourite nun, Sister Agnes, dies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mrs. George Devereaux
programme.desc: Blanche has a dream in which she is visited by her deceased husband, George Devereaux.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun..Before They Die
programme.desc: Blanche tries to help Sophia seduce her date; Rose's relationship with Miles is affected.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stand by Your Man
programme.desc: Blanche meets a man at the library and only after they make a date does she realize he's in a wheelchair. Meanwhile, Rose wants to keep one of the puppies from Dreyfuss's litter despite Blanche's feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge
programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: Movie: Heart of the Holidays
programme.desc: A career-driven woman returns to her hometown for the holidays and faces her high-school boyfriend. Together, they rediscover what matters most in life.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Comes Twice
programme.desc: A top newscaster finds herself regretting letting her man go five years ago. When a Christmas carnival comes to town, she is brought back in time to reconnect with him.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Carousel
programme.desc: A woman is hired by a Royal family to repair a carousel for them before Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: A Nashville Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A television producer is forced to work with the man who broke her heart on a country music Christmas special while being interrupted by Christmas spirits determined for her to revisit her past.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Pregnancy Test
programme.desc: Johnny braces himself for the possibility of another baby in the family after finding a positive pregnancy test and David and Patrick search for privacy.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Asbestos Fest
programme.desc: Moira prepares for her debut at the annual Schitt's Creek Asbestos Fest and David deals with loitering teens in the apothecary.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Girls' Night
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla have a girls' night out and Patrick teaches David about compromise.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: RIP Moira Rose
programme.desc: A rumor of Moira's death appears online and Roland asks Johnny to be his child's godfather.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Open Mic
programme.desc: David and Patrick throw an open mic night at Rose Apothecary and Johnny and Stevie re-brand the motel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Barbeque
programme.desc: Rose plans a family barbeque, David tests the limits of his comfort level with Patrick and Alexis investigates a mysterious text from Ted.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Quality Time

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract and True Hollywood Stories: Rick James

programme.title: Movie: The Anna Nicole Story
programme.desc: The story of Anna Nicole Smith from her humble beginnings to her rise to fame and ultimate downfall.

programme.title: Movie: Lethal Admirer
programme.desc: When a woman's fiancé is killed, she moves cross country and rebuilds her life with a new boyfriend and a closer relationship with her sister. She runs into an old colleague who wants more and will sabotage everything in her life to make her his.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Nurse
programme.desc: After a nurse moves into their house to help care for their son, a couple soon realizes that this 'angel of death' is more than she seems.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: The Curse of Lost Mine Gold

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: End Game
programme.desc: With bonus features and added scenes: Dave and the team take on an all-hands push hoping for rich ground. Both men and machines are pushed to the breaking point and only 48 hours stand between them and a million-dollar season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: How to Mine a Million
programme.desc: Dave invites the crew to Florida, where they reflect on a season filled with the highest highs and lowest lows. Through unseen moments, Team Turin reveals the secret code to their teamwork and success in bringing home million-dollar gold.

programme.desc: Elizabeth's family road trip is off to a rocky start. Angela plans to spy on Michael. Yara reveals some scary news. Kalani comes clean to Asuelu. Natalie holds a grudge against Mike's mom. Nerves run high as Tiffany travels to visit Ronald.

programme.desc: Angela contemplates divorce. Brandon and Julia attempt to fly the nest. Tiffany confronts Ronald over his parenting. Yara starts a new chapter on her own. A misstep by Andrei causes Elizabeth to panic. Natalie makes a big decision without Mike.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: First Look: Man Up or Shut Up
programme.desc: Michael reaches out to Angela. Tensions run high for Natalie's surgery. Andrei's introduction to Elizabeth's family goes awry. Ronald tries to prove that he's a good father. Brandon and Julia have a surprise. Jovi finally comes home.

programme.desc: Scott purchases 11 unfinished villas and hopes to flip all 11 within 45 days.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Turn Up the Heat
programme.desc: In the midst of an Orlando heat wave, the team finds a colourful zombie in the Lake Pineloch neighbourhood. But, when their plan to redesign the kitchen derails and the AC keeps going out, the house looks more like a pressure cooker than a flip.

programme.title: Sell This House!: Bad in Burgundy
programme.desc: Janet and Dermit want to move, but they can't afford a new home until they sell their current one. If they want a fair price, their house will need a serious redesign.

programme.title: Sell This House!: Miracle on Hidden Acres
programme.desc: After dozens of showings, a Texas home has struck out with buyers for over 90 days. The home lacks curb appeal and the interior feels dated and dark. With the next open house just 2 days away, this home must be updated in a pinch.

programme.title: Matter of Fact: Listening Tour: To Be An American - Identity, Race and Justice
programme.desc: Join an urgent conversation about race, equality and justice. Through provocative story-telling the show will create a unique opportunity for viewers to engage in a respectful dialogue on race and social justice.

programme.title: Movie: Extraction
programme.desc: A former CIA operative is kidnapped by a group of terrorists. When his son learns there is no plan for his father to be saved, he launches his own rescue operation.

programme.title: Movie: Unstoppable
programme.desc: A conductor and a veteran engineer race against the clock to stop an unmanned freight train before it reaches a city and causes a catastrophe.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Learn why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Movie: Let's Be Cops
programme.desc: Two goofball buddies are mistaken for real cops when they dress up as police officers for a costume party. Fighting crime is all fun and games until they become wrapped up in a web of real mobsters and crooked detectives.

programme.title: Movie: Let's Be Cops
programme.desc: Two goofball buddies are mistaken for real cops when they dress up as police officers for a costume party. Fighting crime is all fun and games until they become wrapped up in a web of real mobsters and crooked detectives.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Paintball Bullet Catch
programme.desc: Chris, Wes, Eric, and Alex put their own spin on the legendary bullet catch. Plus, Alex reads people's minds and Wes teaches some bar bets.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Roadtrip to Whiskey Castle
programme.desc: The boys hit the road to visit a whiskey tasting at a castle. Road tricks and magic pit stops abound. Plus, The Great Ramsini visits the supermarket, Wes slingshots a balloon, and Alex's illusion shatters expectations.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Compromised Agent
programme.desc: The NSA Interns uncover insane videos, including a man who tests homemade chloroform on himself and a massive wedding fail. Plus, the interns investigate a rogue agent's social media.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Big Time Blunders

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Surprises

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Fails, Falls, and Follie
programme.desc: Find out what happens when a reporter gets busted ordering at a drive-thru on live TV.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Laugh Riot
programme.desc: Learn how to play the most epic game of mattress dominos ever, and see why staircase sledding never gets old.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Popcorn Pants
programme.desc: Michael delivers a shock at a shipping store when wine tips over and gets bubble wrap tipsy. Then, at a popcorn shop, he dons the latest kernel fashions, and at a theater he stuns his helper with a trick that jumps off the screen.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up
programme.desc: A Chicago brewhouse serves up beer to go with mussels, a brisket sandwich and headcheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Layers of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's firin' up the grill and stacking up the flavour. In Toronto, Canada, the restored diner cooking up pork belly, a mac and cheese burger and a Christmas burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef It Up
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's divin' into menus boasting the bomb beef.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Typical Joints
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going off the beaten path to check out some funky finds. In Charlotte, N.C., an eatery tucked inside a beer store slings crazy waffle creations. In Houston, a not-your-everyday fusion joint mashes up killer barbecue with sushi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Cookin' Across the Country
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels from sea to shining sea, starting in Key West, FL, where a food cart has increased its footprint to churn out more kimchi and Kogi dogs. In College Station, TX, an early stop on the DDD road trip is still making classic diner staples.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rib-Stickers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into dishes that'll stick to your ribs. He finds clean eats in Sioux Falls, SD, elevated comfort food like a 25-ingredient meatloaf in Fairbanks, AK, and Midwest mashups in Moorehead, MN.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory with a Side of Sweet
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is jumping into some sweet and savory dishes. In Burlington, Vt., a vegan joint gettin' crazy with a crunch wrap and coconut-banana French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort and Soul
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hittin' up some joints that'll warm the palate and the soul. In Portland, Ore., a funky neighbourhood cafe is cranking out comfort foods like the heartless artichoke sandwich and a curried lentil dish that hits all the right notes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Outside the Box
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Dallas to turn tex-mex into mex-tex with savoury soups. He travels to Baltimore and meets Duff Goldman who stops by to seek out the secrets of the square pizza, and in Santa Barbara, a restaurant is turning turkey into fritters.

programme.desc: Michael Symon creates creamy chicken and dumplings on the grill. Michael's wife makes drop biscuits to serve as the dumplings while Michael picks fresh herbs for the filling. Finally, Michael makes bananas foster on the grill.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Social Sensations
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is home on the ranch trying her hand at internet-famous eats. She makes Mexican birria tacos, burnt cheesecake with blackberries, baked goat cheese pasta and even some corn ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Elevate This
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is elevating four mundane, store-bought ingredients. She's turning a ready-made angel food cake into a stunning Baked Alaska, then she's taking a package of cookie dough and conjuring up Fruit Tarts.

programme.title: The Kitchen: License to Grill
programme.desc: The Kitchen is grilling up the summer's best recipes, including grilled tomatoes with scallions, chives and ricotta and grilled corn and farro salad. Cakealikes judge Kalen Allen stops by to share his opinions on the season's grilling trends.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Fish Made Easy
programme.desc: Michael Symon breaks down the best way to grill fish while making his miso black cod with grilled lime. His wife, Liz, pitches in to help make coconut cheesy rice and grilled greens with lime vinaigrette.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Bring on the Street Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is craving street food from his chef friends. Rocco DiSpirito makes flatbread with stracchino, Traci Des Jardins fries up churros with Mexican hot chocolate spice mix, and Jet Tila makes his pork and pate banh mi.

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: Grilling Italy
programme.desc: Three elite home grillers do Italian night right with their best meatballs, pizza and herb- and spice-inspired dish, all on the grill. Host Sabin Lomac and judges Susie Bulloch and Darnell Ferguson decide who wins the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Game Day BBQ
programme.desc: The teams celebrate a classic BBQ tradition: tailgating. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson mentor their pitmasters as they explore BBQ that brings folks together to fire up their team spirit and their taste buds.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Guilty Pleasures

programme.title: Food Paradise: Extra Cheesy

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Circle of Driving
programme.desc: Hoping to receive a car for his birthday, Barry is shocked by what his mother gives him; Adam asks Pop for advice.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Daddy Daughter Day
programme.desc: Just as a new school year begins, Murray and Erica's family tradition of spending the first Saturday together roller-skating is in jeopardy since Erica has turned into a moody teenager and believes the activity is juvenile.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Women 'N Tuition
programme.desc: Christine tries to make some sacrifices in order to pay for Ritchie's rising school tuition. Meanwhile, Matthew realizes he hasn't been living up to his potential and considers some extreme changes.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Annoyed that Ritchie finds his weekends with his dad more fun than his weekdays with her, Christine decides to make Richard responsible for having Ritchie complete his big homework assignment.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: What About Barb?
programme.desc: When Barb starts working at Christine's gym, which she recently bought into, Christine can't accept the reality of not being in complete control. Meanwhile, Matthew helps Ritchie find the perfect nanny to replace him when he starts medical school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Crash
programme.desc: When Christine's environmentally friendly hybrid car and Marly's gas-guzzling monster SUV hit one another, it becomes a bigger dispute than simply who hit whom. While her car is in the shop, Christine has to rent an SUV when no other car is available.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Scores
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly signs up Ritchie for soccer after Mr. Harris informs her and Richard that he's had trouble making friends. Christine claims not to believe in competitive sports but finds herself in competition with Richard for Mr. Harris' attention.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Endless Shrimp, Endless Night
programme.desc: Christine attempts to re-ignite the relationship between her brother Matthew and his ex-girlfriend. Meanwhile, Richard tries to get Ritchie interested in his job as a contractor.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Let Him Eat Cake
programme.desc: Christine resents that new Christine is reaping the benefits of all the time she spent trying to perfect Richard while they were married. Christine can't tolerate his thinking that new Christine gave him a thoughtful birthday gift when it was her idea.

programme.title: Roseanne: Body by Jake
programme.desc: When Bev breaks her pelvis in the retirement home, Roseanne and Dan are shocked to find out how it happened. As a result, Bev is forced to move in with them rather than die of embarrassment in the retirement community.

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?
programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos
programme.desc: When they have a titanic ego clash, Roseanne is worried about the future of Fred and Jackie's relationship. It seems they just can't make up their minds, or egos, about walking down the aisle together.

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two for One
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.title: Roseanne: Snoop Davey Dave
programme.desc: There's a snitch in the Conner household. Upset over their recent breakup, David tattles on Darlene. And, to Roseanne's horror, she finds out that Darlene is experimenting with drugs.

programme.title: Roseanne: Girl Talk
programme.desc: When Jackie spills the news that Becky and Mark are having sexual problems, Roseanne steps in to solve their dilemma. The situation snowballs when the men realize that no subject is sacred when it comes to their gossiping wives!

programme.title: Roseanne: Sleeper
programme.desc: Which one of the married Conner women did David have a sexy dream about? There is a flurry of activity to figure out the 'who' and the 'why'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Skeleton in the Closet
programme.desc: It's Roseanne's favorite holiday, Halloween, and Leon's planning a 'gay' soiree at the diner. During the party, Roseanne is horrified to learn about a dark secret in Fred's past.

programme.title: Roseanne: Follow the Son
programme.desc: D.J. is growing up, and Roseanne is having trouble loosening the apron strings. Meanwhile, David is stunned to find that Darlene's planning to move in with her new boyfriend, Jimmy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Punch and Jimmy
programme.desc: After D.J. gets pushed around by the town bully, Dan steps in to teach him the basics of self-defense. Recently dumped by Darlene, David begins overcompensating by acting 'macho'.

programme.title: Roseanne: White Men Can't Kiss
programme.desc: When DJ refuses to kiss a black girl in the school play, Dan broods over the source of DJ's racist attitudes. To everyone's surprise, Fred develops a close friendship with his mother-in-law, Bev.

programme.title: Roseanne: Thanksgiving '94

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade returns to the remote rivers of India's Himalayas to investigate a fresh spate of savage attacks.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Sioux Journey
programme.desc: When a beloved dog needs knee surgery, Doctor Jeff may be his only hope. The clinic helps three sugar gliders with an attitude problem. And Dr. Jeff takes his mobile clinic to South Dakota to help animals in need on a Native American reservation.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Turning Point
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff faces the challenge of his life when he learns that he has a serious medical issue. Despite this, he tackles complex surgery on a puppy with internal bleeding. Then, when a young dog is hit by a car, the team races to fix her badly broken leg.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Posey the Terror
programme.desc: Jackson faces the highest stakes of the series when he experiences the vicious claws of a troubled cat who's terrorizing a family about to bring home a newborn baby; Jackson meets an inspirational cat named Skinny; Jackson meets Cole and Marmalade.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Philly's Forgotten Cats

programme.title: Embarrassing Pets: Macaw Madness
programme.desc: Caroline is challenged when a macaw comes in with extreme temper tantrums. Leon handles a hyper hound running rings around his owner, and Dr. Gavin tries to uncover why a hognose snake suddenly began striking his owner.

programme.title: Embarrassing Pets: Paw Problems
programme.desc: At the clinic, owners of an outspoken shih-tzu is in need of dog behaviorist Leon's help to conquer his incessant barking. Later, Dr. Gavin helps a very pesky parrot with this attitude problem, and Dr. Deepti helps a Bichon Frise's itchy paw problem.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat
programme.desc: A markhor goat gives birth to Andre, the biggest baby of the year. A baby bat requires human care before it can be reintroduced to its colony. Later, confiscated lizards destined for the pet trade require urgent medical attention.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.desc: A bloody encounter with an aggressive spirit leads the caretaker of the USS Salem to call on Amy Bruni and Adam Berry to investigate the massive Navy destroyer. A late-in-the-game realization by psychic medium Chip Coffey may solve this troubling haunt.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits: Dead Stop
programme.desc: A recent flurry of ghostly activity may mean that more than one dead guest calls the historic Cashtown Inn home in Gettysburg, PA. Amy Bruni and Adam Berry bring in psychic medium Chip Coffey to help them uncover the source of the supernatural flare-up.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits: Fright Train
programme.desc: A New Hampshire inn is home to apparitions so vivid they're mistaken as living people. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey check in to find out what powerful energy awoke this haunted house from a deep slumber.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious

programme.title: Movie: Fast Five
programme.desc: The crew find themselves on the wrong side of the law again as they try to get out of Brazil.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: Katie feels the weight of the demanding guests, while Lexi copes with a difficult personal issue. Malia works to get her new deck crew up to speed while preparing a bachelor and bachelorette party, but an inexperienced deckhand has trouble keeping up.

programme.title: Top Chef Amateurs: Absolutely Radishing
programme.desc: A pharmacist and a pharmaceutical sales rep must 'root out' the flavors in a variety of radishes and work with Top Chef alums, Kwame Onwuachi and Shirley Chung, to win over the palates of the judges.

programme.title: Top Chef Amateurs: Don’t Clam Up!
programme.desc: Two of the biggest Top Chef superfans must dig deep to make unique shellfish dishes with help from Top Chef alums, Melissa King and Gregory Gourdet. Dale Talde and Shirley Chung join Gail Simmons at the judges’ table, where no shell is left unturned.

programme.title: Top Chef Amateurs: No Need to Egg-splain
programme.desc: There’s no nesting for a residential architect and an actor who must cook alongside Richard Blais and Joe Flamm to create flavorful dishes using a unique variety of eggs for judges Gail Simmons, Jen Carroll, and Tiffany Derry.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Rock and a Hard Price
programme.desc: Altman hosts a rocking open house for a Trousdale party pad that once belonged to Howard Hughes. Flagg struggles to find the perfect family house for a very particular buyer, who questions if Flagg is the right fit for her.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman Versus Fredrik
programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts. Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy tries to balance her new portfolio with her demanding developer who has high expectations and a rocky past with Altman. James and David are up against the clock to find their nine months pregnant client her dream home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Ze Plane, Ze Plane!
programme.desc: Altman struggles to convince an unrealistic seller but risks losing the potential listing. Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones in Pasadena. Flagg goes all out with a plane for his new resort-style trophy listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Flagg it or Bag it
programme.desc: James and David host a backyard BBQ in Santa Monica, Altman goes after a new modern in Bird Streets, but is shocked when the sellers consider a low-ball offer. Flagg tries to find "Glee" star Becca Tobin her dream home in the historic Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: 24 Hours or Else
programme.desc: Altman races against the clock after being thrown a curveball by his Bird Streets sellers. James and David experience difficulties with their Santa Monica gem as the sellers have their own ideas about price, and who the buyers should be.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Swedish Invasion
programme.desc: James and David work with Zach Vella to list an architectural gem, but Fredrik's arrival in LA puts the pressure on to get it sold. Altman tries to find a modern above the Sunset Strip with space for all of his car enthusiast clients' toys.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Medieval Time Machine

programme.title: Bunk'd: Rise of the Machine

programme.title: Bunk'd: R.V. Having Fun Yet?

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Snapped: Rachel Kozloff
programme.desc: When a beloved biker is found shot to death in his Pennsylvania apartment, detectives track down leads from rival biker clubs to scorned lovers to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Angela Dickinson
programme.desc: On the same day his wife is giving birth, an Alabama trucker is found shot in his own home and as investigators uncover a sinister web of lies, they discover the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped: Eunice Cristina Rodriguez
programme.desc: After a woman discovers her brother's brutally beaten body on his bathroom floor, Texas police follow clue after clue and weave together a tale of greed, deception, and manipulation.

programme.title: Snapped: Porsche Humphery
programme.desc: When a well-liked young man in Milwaukee, WI is found shot to death inside his locked home, detectives must piece together his final days through a network of friends and lovers to expose a killer’s desire to kill what they couldn’t keep.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lynn Friend was a devoted mother with wedding plans when she vanished. The question was whether she was a runaway bride, or if she ran into trouble. Investigators searched land and sea, going to unexpected depths to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secret Lives
programme.desc: Missing wife, grieving husband; turns out, both had secrets. Jen Ramsaran vanished just before Christmas and detectives needed to know if her online life held the key to this mystery or if the answer was closer to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A successful, seemingly healthy doctor collapses at home and is rushed to the ER, leaving friends and colleagues puzzled. When her blood test reveals what killed her, the case goes from a medical mystery to murder mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While He Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When Eric Somuah was found shot in his bed, it was hard to imagine who would want the outgoing salesman dead. One dogged detective refused to give up. His investigation put him on a path filled with twists, turns and an ending few saw coming.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Musclehead Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy Miami couple disappears leaving an abandoned Lamborghini. Police are perplexed until a rich businessman comes forward with a bizarre and torturous tale of a group of muscled men looking for a fast way to flashy cars and a fabulous lifestyle.

programme.title: The Killer Affair: Dying For Love
programme.desc: Police investigate the murder of a popular insurance salesman in a small midwestern town. As they untangle a web of lies and deceit, they discover that a religious leader hides some sinful secrets.

programme.title: The Killer Affair: Murder in the Suburbs
programme.desc: When a wife and mother is horrifically murdered in a wealthy suburb, police uncover a hidden world of sex and drugs that leads them to a killer they never expected.

programme.title: The Killer Affair: Deadly Double Life
programme.desc: Police in Michigan struggling to solve the murder of a beloved scrapyard owner get a break in the case when an ex-cop's suicide note exposes a web of lies and a secret affair.

programme.title: Dateline: Unspeakable
programme.desc: A couple's anniversary celebration ends in murder in what appears to be a home invasion. Investigators think the suspect is much closer to the victim.

programme.title: Dateline: The Sting
programme.desc: In an exclusive interview, Dalia Dippolito denies solicitation to commit first-degree murder after she was accused of hiring a hit man, who turned out to be an undercover police officer, to murder her husband in 2009.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Still of the Night (Pocatello, ID)
programme.desc: A sweet young woman was found brutally stabbed to death in her bedroom. Kelly and Yolanda are in the precarious position of finding her killer amidst multiple possible suspects.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Miss Congeniality (Yakima County, WA)
programme.desc: A young mother of three is found shot to death in her car that was pulled over on the side of a highway. Kelly and Yolanda face the difficult task of find a killer who seemed to disappear under the dark cover of night.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mother Daughter Tragedy
programme.desc: In 1993, a 29-year-old mother and her six-year-old daughter were found strangled to death in their home. Former prosecutor Kelly Siegler and former crime-scene investigator Yolanda McClary investigate seeking the person responsible.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Devoted (Fort Walton Beach, FL)
programme.desc: A vivacious mother of two mysteriously vanishes from beautiful Fort Walton Beach, FL. Just three days later, several people receive a cryptic group text from her but never hear from her again.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Room #10
programme.desc: The Cold Justice team returns to Fort Myers, FL to put their investigative skills to work on a 22-year-old murder case of a woman found shot in the head, covered in bloody sheets and dumped behind a community rec center.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Golden Years Gone
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey head to Colorado to help the Prowers County Sheriff's Office investigate the 1991 homicide of a beloved elderly couple who were brutally killed while working at their local VFW Hall.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Death Among Him
programme.desc: Kelly & Tonya take on an investigation so big that it spans two episodes. They head to Wyoming to work with Carbon County Law Enforcement to look into the mysterious deaths of two women years apart, but connected by the same circle of friends.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Death Among Him
programme.desc: In part two of their investigation, the Cold Justice team continues to investigate three mysterious deaths in Wyoming. The team hopes to finally be able to give answers to all the families involved.

programme.title: Cold Justice: A Mother's Dying Wish
programme.desc: Kelly & Steve return to Hernando County, Florida to help look into the two decade old homicide of a 21-year-old woman who disappeared after a late night party. Years later her body was discovered in an orange grove nearby.

programme.title: Movie: Brightburn
programme.desc: What if a child from another world crash-landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns Cage
programme.desc: When Smithers is devastated by Mr. Burns' lack of affection towards him, Homer makes it his mission to find him a boyfriend. Meanwhile, Bart orchestrates the removal of the lead in the school's stage production of 'Casablanca.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: After getting into an argument, Marge takes Lisa on a touristy trip to Capital City, where, after attending a musical, they meet the show's star, Andrew Rannells, who reminds Lisa how lucky she is to have such a great mom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fland Canyon
programme.desc: Homer recalls a tense family vacation to the Grand Canyon with the Flanders family. At first, the Flanders' perfection puts the families at odds, but when they get stranded and Ned and Bart go for help, the families finally bond.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simprovised
programme.desc: After butchering a speech in front of all of his friends at work, Homer turns to improv comedy to gain back his confidence in his public speaking skills. Meanwhile, Marge decides to rebuild Bart's lacklustre treehouse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Orange Is the New Yellow
programme.desc: When Marge gets arrested for letting Bart go to the park unsupervised, she serves time only to realize that prison is a welcome break from the demands of her life as a mom and wife. In her absence, Homer tries to manage the parenting responsibilities.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Burns' Fleeing Circus
programme.desc: When Springfield is burned to the ground, the Simpsons beg Mr. Burns to fund its rebuilding. Burns agrees with one condition: he gets to put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he may play dad. Now alone, Homer finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVII
programme.desc: Mr. Burns introduces a 'Hunger Games'-style contest in which Springfield's children must fight each other, and Lisa's imaginary best friend becomes jealous of Lisa's real best friends.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Trust But Clarify
programme.desc: Lisa and Bart investigate Krusty's suspicious new 'Krustaceans' candy. Meanwhile, Homer wants a promotion at the nuclear plant and asks Marge to help him dress the part, and news anchor Kent Brockman struggles to find his feet in the changing media world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There Will Be Buds
programme.desc: Homer gets roped into coaching the kids’ lacrosse team with Milhouse’s dad, Kirk, who is in desperate need of a friend. When Kirk gets too clingy, Homer vents about how much of a loser he is.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Havana Wild Weekend
programme.desc: When the Retirement Castle and the V.A. Hospital can't solve Grampa's health issues, the Simpsons decide to take a family trip to Cuba to get him cheap medical care.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dad Behavior
programme.desc: Homer finds a new app that makes his life much easier and outsources his father-son bonding. Meanwhile, Grampa finds that he is about to be a father again.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Woof of Wall Street
programme.desc: Brian convinces Stewie to teach him how to invest in the stock market after learning Stewie has a knack for making money from it. Meanwhile, Peter, Quagmire, Cleveland and Joe look after the Drunken Clam while Jerome is away.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy' Through the Years
programme.desc: 'Family Guy' is reimagined as a series that's been on the air for 60 years and, in a special retrospective, it looks back at the cultural events and issues that were tackled on the show in the 1950s, ’60s and ’70s.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Archer decides to give Lana the perfect baby shower gift by forcing Kenny Loggins to sing a duet with Cherlene.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Smugglers' Blues
programme.desc: Archer travels to Columbia on a secret mission that becomes not so secret after he gets drunk.

programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Winter
programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Madagascar: Island of Marvels

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The narrow eastern strip of the island is rich in life; travel from the highest mountains, where trees are few, to lush rainforests, to the tropical coast, home to ring-tailed lemurs, jewelled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: Madagascar: Land of Heat and Dust
programme.desc: Some of the strategies for survival in Madagascar's dry south are ingenious.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Fortune
programme.desc: It's Dr. Pols birthday, but before the celebrations can begin, there's a bevy of cases for the Pol Veterinary staff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Hot Llama
programme.desc: The leaves have changed and the first hints of winter appear in central Michigan. Dr. Pol and the PVS crew are still hard at work servicing the farms and small animal owners of Isabella County and the surrounding areas.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: I Love Moo!

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Dragon's Fire
programme.desc: A dark object is captured flying among skyscrapers in China and an explosion engulfs the side of a high-rise in flames at the same moment; experts investigate this astonishing evidence of terrifying, dragon-like creatures.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: How It's Made: Putty Knives, Garage Doors, Electric Motors, Wool
programme.desc: Learn how putty knives, garage doors, electric motors, and wool are made.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Sustainable Hotels
programme.desc: Hospitality is important in a world on-the-go, so George sends Jackie to Dubai and Oman to check in and check out the latest uses of Artificial Intelligence and Sustainability in the hotel industry.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Mystery of the Face Parasite
programme.desc: A man sees a doctor complaining of agonizing facial pain, and when they investigate, they discover a strange parasitic species living deep in the man's nose; footage of the grisly encounter reveals what happened next.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of Satan's Crown
programme.desc: A bizarre explosion is captured that morphs into a sinister black ring of smoke above a California football stadium; experts investigate and uncover an underground network of Satanists with connections to a string of modern-day terrorist plots.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Possessed by an Alien
programme.desc: When footage reveals a man's leg taking on a life of its own, it appears that something alien is trying to burst free; cutting-edge science investigates what explains this strange and sinister possession, and what it takes to exorcise the invader inside.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: House Rules
programme.desc: Two sisters, with little in common, cope with their overly protective mother in very different ways and with very deadly consequences.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Living Lies
programme.desc: A picture-perfect marriage ends with a horrific murder.While the killer puts the blame on cold medicine, investigators suspect a different diagnosis.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Officer Down
programme.desc: Officers find themselves pitted against a lone gunman holed up in a suburban home; the nerve of a rookie cop is tested when a routine stop on the highway goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.
