programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Murder on Prom Night
programme.desc: A survivor deals with the trauma after her stepbrother is convicted of killing her family in order to go to the prom.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A mother of two claims she saw the murder of a friend in her dreams. In fact the dream was a reality and her friend was later found bludgeoned to death in Central Florida.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: Banana Power
programme.desc: Greg Jackson, aka Onision, has become one of YouTube's most controversial figures. After skyrocketing to Internet fame in the mid-2000s, the content creator begins a relationship with an underage fan named Shiloh.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: You've Destroyed Me
programme.desc: The Onision saga continues as the world watches his toxic relationship with Shiloh implode. Before the dust can settle, Onision connects with a new teen fan named Kai, and allegations arise that Greg uses Kai to attract a slew of new, vulnerable victims.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: Unmonitored, Ungovernable, and Chaotic
programme.desc: Onision's victims begin speaking out, prompting journalist Chris Hansen to enter the arena as law enforcement continues to investigate. Facing a storm of controversy, Onision lashes out against his detractors, trying to save his legacy and freedom.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Charmed by a Killer
programme.desc: When a mom disappears from her home, suspicion moves from one admirer to another. Will a surprise confession solve the mystery? Then, a young woman is beaten to death, and her mother starts an international manhunt for the suspected killer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill Their Creators
programme.desc: Extraordinary cases of women who repay a parent's unconditional love with cold-hearted betrayal.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: On a quiet cul de sac, a contractor helps his neighbour rent the home beside him, unwittingly trapping himself between an increasingly unhinged presence on one side and the man's hostile parents on the other. It's a conflict that will end in bloodshed.

programme.title: Body Cam: No Surrender
programme.desc: A car crash ignites a fireball that threatens a Maryland officer making a traffic stop. In Ohio, an armed burglar hides in a closet, and officers must smoke him out. In Texas, an officer confronts a wanted felon who suddenly pulls a gun on him.

programme.title: Body Cam: Under Siege
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, a domestic dispute ends in tragedy when two deputies are trapped with a gun-wielding suspect; in Iowa, a high-speed pursuit escalates to a gruesome conclusion.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in a Love Triangle
programme.desc: Henry Lee Marshall is obsessed with Martha Leathers, and in a fit of jealousy, kills her husband and flees. Unable to stay away for long, Marshall returns to harass her. Finally, after nine years of stalking Martha, his time on the run comes to an end.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.desc: Adam Richman travels to the Midwest, where he decides between a four-courser sandwich in Chicago and a BLT sandwich in St. Louis.

programme.title: Best Sandwich in America: West Coast
programme.desc: Adam's search for the best sandwich in America brings him to the West Coast, where he picks the best between a pulled pork sandwich in Los Angeles, a BBQ tri-tip sandwich in San Diego and a pulled lamb sandwich in San Francisco.

programme.title: Best Sandwich in America: Great Lakes
programme.desc: Adam's hunt for the best sandwich in America leads him to the Great Lakes, where he'll name the best in the region between a fish taco torta in Minneapolis, a prime rib sandwich in Green Bay and the Yardbird sandwich in Detroit.

programme.title: Best Sandwich in America: Southwest
programme.desc: Adam tries out some interesting and meaty sandwiches in Driftwood, Texas, Austin, Texas and Phoenix, Arizona.

programme.title: Best Sandwich in America: New England
programme.desc: Adam finds sandwiches with crab, lobster and turkey in Portsmouth, NH, Maine and New Haven, CT.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Americana
programme.desc: Classic American fare gets the royal treatment at these extraordinary spots. Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works and mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn are featured.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Great Spaces
programme.desc: Take a tour of the most unique places and spaces in dining today. From a food truck serving the most delectable Korean/Mexican dishes on four wheels, to a LEED-certified bowling-alley-come-music-venue boasting it's own special Blue Ribbon menu.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Italian
programme.desc: Classic Italian meets passion, authenticity and innovation at these noteworthy restaurants. Vetri has been called one of the best Italian restaurants in America, presenting simple, fresh, authentic Italian dishes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Houston Weekend
programme.desc: Spend 36 hours in Houston with us for a unique culinary tour of the most innovative restaurants.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Mash-Ups
programme.desc: Visit a restaurant that mixes different ethnic traditions to create new and unique flavours. Texas tradition with Italian standards; Las Vegas burgers with Asian ingredients; and Japanese-Peruvian dishes in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hot & Spicy
programme.desc: Find out what spices have people coming back for more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Roger Mooking bites down on the 15 best crunchy, crispy and crackling dishes. Nachos, pizzas, fried chicken, tacos and desserts are represented. Chefs offer recipes and tips on making the crispiest skin, the crunchiest chips and the most-crumbly crusts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lone Star Load-Up
programme.desc: Roger is loading up on the best brisket, pork steaks and sausages the Lone Star state has to offer. Ronnie's BBQ in Johnson City attracts locals and barbecue aficionados.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swine Dining
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the Liberty Kitchen in Houston, Texas, where Chef Lance Fegen has built a monster wood-fired Argentinian grill. Roger and Lance prepare a traditional Balinese pig roast by spit-roasting it over bold mesquite coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wake Up Little Sushi
programme.desc: Alton investigates the ins and outs of ordering, eating, shopping for, and even making sushi.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Wing and I
programme.desc: Prepare America's most ubiquitous of bar foods, Buffalo chicken wings.

programme.title: Good Eats: Little Big Lunch: Eggs Benedict
programme.desc: Eggs Benedict is king of the brunch, so Alton rebuilds a 'Good Eats' version.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Shakshuka
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a deep dive on one of the most internet-famous dishes of the decade by way of a famous film from the 1940s. Along the way, Alton talks through preserved lemons and homemade harissa.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Guitar Heroes
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Puppy Problems/ The Mighty Little Dragon
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a puppy who seems like a perfect angel, but turns out to be a mischievous rascal. Pip and Freddy pretend to be knights while delivering a Komodo dragon.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Big Jon Big Trouble/ Min's Quest
programme.desc: Jon gets overwhelmed when he tries to tame a dinosaur himself. Then, Min learns about perseverance when she helps a mother brontosaurus.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Clover's Tiny Problem/ Tango's BFF
programme.desc: Clover realizes Min won't replace him with any dinosaur. Then, Tango becomes attached to a triceratops and doesn't want her to rejoin her herd.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cupcake's Birthday/ Dog Wash Derby
programme.desc: When the plans for Cupcake’s birthday go awry, Rufus suggests that they find the perfect gift for her instead. Bob has too much to do at Playcare, so the pups gear up to help!

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Perfecto Day!/ Running of the Roadsters!
programme.desc: While in Madrid, Mickey plans a perfect day for Minnie, but a playful baby bull has other plans. Minnie and Daisy make a bet with Mickey and Donald over who will win the race.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Lost Dinosaur/ The Dino Doldrums
programme.desc: Min learns the importance of respecting nature when she sees a rare dinosaur. Then, Blitz tries to hide his sickness when the Rand dinos become ill.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: The Ballad of Big Jon/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Jon learns his small deeds make him a hero, and Min and Jane learn about kindness when they're chased by wild raptors.

programme.desc: A special winner gets mixed-up for the day! When Clarabelle ends up with the hidden royal scepter, everyone in Royalandia thinks she's the new princess!

programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.desc: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn, Ray and Henry accidentally bring to life the Popcorn Monster. To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash against Dr. Minyak, Schwoz hatches a plan: shrink Kid Danger and have him pilot his own drone.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini
programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: Danger Force: Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Miles Has Visions
programme.desc: When AWOL starts seeing visions of the future right before they happen, Captain Man believes it must be the work of Swellview’s leading time-crime villain, The Time Jerker.

programme.title: Danger Force: Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Wahoo Punch Bro/ Pink Rocket
programme.desc: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up a race between Henry and Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

programme.title: Danger Force: SW.A.G is Haunted
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Manlee Men
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Rise to Victory! Triumph Dragon!
programme.desc: Dante Koryu is itching to battle the Hizashi brothers, and Hyuga is up first! Meanwhile, after hearing about Lain’s unrivaled strength, Cap’n seeks him out to see if this ‘flare’ is all it’s cracked up to be. It's a showdown of guts and glory!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: A True Hero! Tag Battle Style!
programme.desc: When Hikaru and Rantaro go up against Dante and Lui, one thing is clear: they’d better hope their teamwork is enough to win! Meanwhile, Aiger finds himself conflicted over his pairing with Lain Valhalla.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: A Tale of Two Stans
programme.desc: Stan decides to run for Mayor of Gravity Falls to earn the kids’ and the townsfolk respect.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall
programme.desc: Hop Pop investigates the disappearance of an old friend and the shadowy crime syndicate he suspects are behind it. Hop Pop takes the kids to a Newtopian shopping mall to buy souvenirs, and Anne will do anything to get the perfect gift for her mom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect

programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love

programme.title: Movie: Jaws
programme.desc: A great white shark attacks and terrorizes the residents of a Long Island beach town.

programme.title: Sharks of the Badlands
programme.desc: With white sharks infesting the waters off Cape Cod, Greg Skomal and Kina Scollay are testing new cutting-edge technology for shark detecting. If all goes well, they will bring it to Cape Cod to make the water safe again.

programme.title: Movie: Jaws
programme.desc: A great white shark attacks and terrorizes the residents of a Long Island beach town.

programme.desc: Dr. Craig O'Connell seeks sawsharks in the Bass Strait, while Victoria Elena Vasquez and Dr. David Ebert look for goblin sharks in Tokyo Bay; they also find ghost sharks, frilled sharks, and lantern sharks.

programme.title: Zombie Sharks

programme.title: Monster Mako

programme.title: Tyson Vs. Jaws: Rumble on the Reef

programme.title: Alien Sharks: First Contact

programme.title: Air Jaws: The Hunted

programme.title: Guy Fieri's Feeding Frenzy

programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon are excited to return to West Covina as it is a hidden honeypot for the duo. While it's off the beaten path, Jarrod and Brandi decide to follow Darrell's lead into the Inland Empire. Plus, Ivy searches for low level merchandise.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Mission to Mars
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack are headed to the Mars Desert Research Station in Utah. As the men traverse one of the most beautiful states in America, they must also endure the long drive to San Rafael Swell, where the research station is located.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Illin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Jack and Ozzy learn about competitive lumberjacks. When Jack gets the flu, Ozzy visits a coffee roaster himself. After Jack recovers, they visit an oyster farm and then visit a medium.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Unidentified Flying Ozzy
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack pack up a camper and travel to the home of all things UFO: Roswell, New Mexico. While Jack is a true UFO believer and loves camping, Ozzy is a skeptic and loathes the outdoors when it's freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal get a little too greedy with fellow shoppers at the market and then offer disservices to a focus group. Tonight's loser learns that the grass is always pinker on the other side.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Breaking Wind Beneath My Wings
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Breaking Wind Beneath My Wings
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee
programme.desc: The three chefs make recreations of McDonald's Sausage McMuffin with egg for Bobby Lee.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: GaTa
programme.desc: GaTa tasks the three chefs with recreating Domino's Hawaiian Pizza.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Amanda Seales
programme.desc: The three chefs aim to recreate Taco Bell's Cheesy Gordita Crunch for Amanda Seales.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nutrition
programme.desc: Adam shows why vitamin supplements don't make us any healthier, and that the 'balanced breakfast' we've been sold is anything but. Later, he reveals how most of the nutritional science the media reports on isn't science at all.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Work
programme.desc: Adam shows how the 40-hour work week not only exhausts employees but also harms businesses, reveals the legal mess of hiring interns and freelancers, and explores how discussing your salary with co-workers is actually a good thing.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Death
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam explains that 'the end' is inevitable, shows why immortality is a fantasy, and reveals that the American funeral industry is a racket that exploits mourners' grief and fear of dying.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Football
programme.desc: Adam hits the gridiron to show why the playoffs rarely determine which team is best, and he explores how sports drink hydration myths are putting kids at risk.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 12
programme.desc: Butter-fingered figure-skaters, busted-ass break dancers, klutzy beauty pageant contestants and comedians who are only funny because they're so not funny.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty
programme.desc: This episode includes a horrifying Halloween mask removal, a couple attacking a hornet's nest and an impossible task: getting the good donuts out of the conference room without being noticed.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Breathe In, Breathe Out
programme.desc: The Interns watch an elephant attack a brunch, a truck brave a flood and a bull remove a man's pants. Plus, the NSA Director pays them an accidental visit.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Backyard Bar Wars: Magician's Lair vs. Village Bunker Bar
programme.desc: An amateur magician aims to be Party King of the Block.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
programme.desc: Harry is selected as Hogwarts' representative in the Tri-Wizard Tournament. But between the stresses of school and the aching of his mysterious scar, he doesn't realize the forces of evil are plotting and he's a part of it.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
programme.desc: Before his fifth year begins, Harry and his cousin are attacked by Dementors, forcing Harry to use magic outside of Hogwarts and therefore face the possibility of a trial and being expelled from the school. The Order of the Phoenix is founded.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter and Dumbledore embark on a dangerous journey to defeat Harry's evil enemy, Voldemort. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang probe into the identity of the mysterious Half-Blood Prince.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
programme.desc: While racing to destroy Horcruxes, Harry discovers the Deathly Hallows, the most powerful objects in the wizarding world.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione return to Hogwarts to find and destroy the last of the horcruxes.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
programme.desc: Before his fifth year begins, Harry and his cousin are attacked by Dementors, forcing Harry to use magic outside of Hogwarts and therefore face the possibility of a trial and being expelled from the school. The Order of the Phoenix is founded.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter and Dumbledore embark on a dangerous journey to defeat Harry's evil enemy, Voldemort. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang probe into the identity of the mysterious Half-Blood Prince.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Click on the Link
programme.desc: Whether they're long links, plump patties or spicy little slices, everyone loves sausage and we're sampling the best the US has to offer. Start off by checking out a chorizo burger in Jacksonville, Florida, and getting down on a sausage sampler.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Global Grub
programme.desc: Experience a vast array of global food, from Mexican tortas to Greek lasagna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up small towns with big flavor. In Parkland, Wisconsin, the he stops at a roadside bar making sandwiches stuffed with brisket and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Racing Through Charlotte
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out high octane joints in Charlotte, North Carolina, with NASCAR driver Clint Bowyer. First, the relocated Triple-D alum dishin' out dynamite burgers and a unique spin on shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pierogis, Pork and Pizza
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diving into all kinds of off-the-hook flavors on this trip. In Hollywood, Fla., a sandwich shop servin' up a terrific taste of Peru. A pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven is stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint is loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Time Tested Treasures
programme.desc: Host John Catucci travels to Ontario's wilderness to discover a hidden gem in Busters BBQ, where blueberries are the key to killer sauce. John also visits the Argo Café in Vancouver, B.C. where they serve up everything from your typical diner.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Play Like A Girl
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, volunteer for snack duty with the non-profit organization Play Like a Girl, which encourages girls to participate in sports to build confidence.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: The Bluebird Cafe
programme.desc: Dishes include cornbread and chili bites, orange barbeque steak kabobs, and charred lemon ricotta dip with dippers.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All the Colors of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is celebrating spring's colourful bounty by creating a visual feast that delights the senses and her guest, The Kitchen's Katie Lee. The menu includes golden raspberry goat cheese crostini, roasted rainbow carrots, and more.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: One More Time, It's a Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is always looking for the latest and greatest ways to prepare and use grilled chicken. She's sharing her latest tricks for picture-perfect birds with recipes like chicken fried rice.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Merc Deliveries
programme.desc: Work on Ree Drummond's mercantile store and deli is going full steam ahead, and she's cooking to keep the construction wheels in motion. First, fabulous Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwiches piled high with crunchy coleslaw.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night on the Town
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is having a night on the town with Ladd at a big bash for the Osage Cattlemen's Convention, so she's taken care of dinner for the kids to eat back at home. She prepares a slam-in-the-oven mini meatballs pasta bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 3 Apps and a Cocktail
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has cocktail hour and a summer party on her mind. She puts her ranch kitchen spin on a BBQ shrimp cocktail, makes irresistible buffalo chicken meatball skewers, bakes bacon ranch cheesy bread and mixes up blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Pasta Favorites
programme.desc: It's non-stop pasta with a collection of delicious ranch favourites from down the years. There's a feisty fiesta mac & cheese casserole to stock the freezer.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Daily Gratitude
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is showing her friend and Today Show co-anchor Hoda Kotb a great summer meal she can make for her family. Their menu includes flank steak with lemon lime herb sauce and smoky tomato eggplant dip with grilled sourdough.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Food, Fast!
programme.desc: Trisha invites pro racer Danica Patrick to make a pit stop in her kitchen. Trisha starts the day with recipes that are quick and easy to make, like a Cubano Sandwich with Quick Pickles, Pressure Cooker Potatoes with Smoky Aioli, Three Bean Salad and more.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Space Kitchen
programme.desc: Following a visit to Space Center Houston with her husband, Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood is inspired to get in the kitchen and make some recipes that are out of this world. Her space-inspired menu starts with Buzzed Aldrin cocktails.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer in a Snap
programme.desc: The Kitchen is keeping it easy and breezy for summer with recipes to make in a snap. Katie Lee makes sesame shrimp and greens with rice foil packs. The hosts make stuffed grilled avocados loaded with their favourite guacamole ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grocery Rush
programme.desc: Guy gives the chefs three turbo-charged games with only 15-20 minutes to shop, cook and plate, making breakfast, lunch and dinner over three short rounds.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Team Games
programme.desc: Dynamic duos are taking over Flavortown Market to show they have the teamwork skills to take on Guy Fieri's games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: $12 Meal Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri pushes the culinary limits of four Flavortown rookies by challenging them to cook a day's worth of meals with a budget of just $12 for each round.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens
programme.desc: A trio of new penguin chicks are introduced to the pool for their first swim. Family dynamics change when the mandrill monkey troop welcomes a new baby. Plus, a pair of king vultures are prepped for their big debut at the Queens Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when a beloved freshwater crocs stops laying eggs. Later, a bison embryo makes a cross-country journey for a groundbreaking project, and keepers train a coalition of cheetahs to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move
programme.desc: A trio of rare Dhole canines are prepared to make their cross-country journey to the zoo, and keepers anxiously await their arrival. A tinamou chick must be hand-reared, while a specialized tool is welded to extract a tusk from a charming Babirusa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when a beloved freshwater crocs stops laying eggs. Later, a bison embryo makes a cross-country journey for a groundbreaking project, and keepers train a coalition of cheetahs to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bushfire Rescue
programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: A Baby Giraffe's Tall Order
programme.desc: After the birth of Talbert the giraffe, complications arise and the Irwins worry for his life. Robert rescues an entangled black swan caught in fishing line, while Bindi and Chandler plan for Kingston the rhino's first birthday.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Legends of the Galapagos
programme.desc: The Irwins and Harriet, a 168-year-old tortoise taken from the Galapagos Islands by Charles Darwin, go on an adventure to see what her homeland and living relatives are like.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Sharks: Outside the Cage
programme.desc: Steve Irwin ventures into the oceans around Australia to study many of the more placid and harmless sharks. Among the 'friendly' species he encounters, nothing compares to the spine chilling experience of being confronted by dozens of huge Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Croc Live
programme.desc: No cuts, no edits, no dress rehearsal. Join the Crocodile Hunter live from Australia.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodile Coast
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi venture along the west Australian coast in search of crocodiles and sharks. They encounter wild crocodiles in the thick oozie mud of the Kimberley Coast. Also, on a reef off the coast, Steve dives with a mass of sea snakes.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi swim with dolphins, seals and sharks. Steve dives to the ancient wreck of the Batavia and explores a habitat of Tamar wallabies and pythons.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Tigers of Shark Bay
programme.desc: Steve learns how to trap an eleven-foot tiger shark in a plastic bag and catch a tiger by the tail in Western Australia's Shark Bay.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert & The Rattlesnakes
programme.desc: Robert wrangles Western Diamondback rattlesnakes in Arizona for the first time, learning techniques.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Danny and Kevin find themselves in hot water when a motorcycle pullover goes south. Later, a woman brings in her recovered IROC-Z and leaves with a genius thief-busting solution.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Rockabilly Roadster
programme.desc: Danny and the boys give away a perfect hot rod at the annual Rockabilly Reunion at Lake Havasu. Later, a lady biker stuns the boys with a custom order for the bike of her dreams.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Old School
programme.desc: Shane's fiancée Tanya wants to return a favour by returning Shane's prized 1970 Mustang to its former glory. Later, Danny and Kevin find a rare Plymouth Roadrunner and help a portrait artist honour our fallen heroes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Zombie Truck
programme.desc: Kevin and Roli make an unplanned stop to check out a mysteriously small vehicle. Later, Danny gets a call from Rob Zombie who wants to customize a truck for his upcoming tour that kicks off in just seven days.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tour de Pants
programme.desc: A customer is brought to tears when the shop presents him with a chopper dedicated to his lost mother. Later, Danny surprises his band member with a hippy van, while Mike and Scott race to settle a score.

programme.title: Counting Cars: School of Rick
programme.desc: The Count takes a chance by building a low-rider with a Count's Kustoms twist. Later, a businesswoman commissions the shop to surprise her husband with his very first bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Pimp My Bus
programme.desc: Kevin disapproves of how much money Danny is spending tricking out his dream FMC Motorhome, but Danny has a surprise plan to help him get over it. Later, he builds a movie replica bike to commemorate a customer's lost friend.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: Danny lets painter Ryan take the lead on a 1959 Chevy Panel Truck project he hopes to flip, and later motivates his crew to clean up the shop with an inter-departmental build competition.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Down by the Riviera
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera. He gives Danny free rein to put the Count's Kustoms rock 'n' roll touch on it. Also, Roli and Horny Mike custom wrap Roli's detailing van.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Run It Like You Brung It
programme.desc: Mike gifts all the guys with their own drifter trikes, under one condition; they must customize them, and then race them at the local track. Everyone is up to the challenge, everyone except Kevin.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mo' Parts Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Danny is doubly-blessed when a his-and-hers restoration is commissioned for a 1970 Plymouth Road Runner and a 1970 Dodge Coronet. Plus, Roli hopes to become the next airbrusher, but Ryan and Mike have other plans for him.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sailor's Soul
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Champion Chopper
programme.desc: When the World Series of Poker guys want a Count's Kustoms chopper as the ultimate online giveaway, Danny is determined to make it something special, without looking like a billboard.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part One
programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour endurance race called The LeMons. This race pits cheap hunks of junk against each other deep in the Arizona desert. Meanwhile, Danny has the guys work on a special one of a kind project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part Two
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the Arizona Lemons race; a beat up old racer, once owned by Shannon. With a little begging and very little cash they buy it back. Next they resurrect the Junker as the 'Counts Bloody Mess.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Big Love Buick
programme.desc: A couple from Miami enlist the Counts Kustom crew to raise money to combat a rare disease. Meanwhile, Ryan and Shannon restore a 1954 Harley Davidson Panhead motorcycle to its former glory.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Texas Tragedy
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds work with the Jasper County Sheriff's Department to take on the 2012 disappearance of a 56-year-old mother. The investigation uncovers family drama, rumors of doomsday prepping and a daughter waiting for her mother to return.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Family Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly travels to Abbey Abbondandolo’s home state to work with the Idaho Falls PD to help investigate the 2007 homicide of a young mother. When her body was discovered almost 3 years later outside the city, it left a family searching for her killer.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Valentine's Day Violence
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya investigate the 2016 murder of a young Florida mother shot to death in her own home. It'll take cutting-edge forensic technology and old-school interrogation techniques to catch her killer and bring justice to her grieving mother.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Holiday Homicide
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey Abbondandolo investigate the cold-blooded killing of a tow truck business owner. Their investigation uncovers a twisted world of alleged abuse, infidelity, and a possible murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Alligator God
programme.desc: Deep in the Florida Everglades, detectives find a human head but no body. As they attempt to identify the victim, a Florida man comes forward with an unbelievable story.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Death & Taxes
programme.desc: When a prominent tax attorney is found strangled and locked inside a storm shelter, authorities are baffled. As disturbing evidence is uncovered, detectives wonder if those close to him may hold the answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Indiscretion
programme.desc: It was a violent and bizarre crime scene: #1 scrawled next to the lifeless body. The victim’s boyfriend had an alibi and the case went cold. Then, a DNA hit. But investigators couldn’t figure out the link between two people separated by 1,500 miles.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Shining Star
programme.desc: Chiquita Tate was growing her reputation as a tenacious defense attorney but her promising career was cut short when she was murdered. Police had a challenge. At work, she dealt with tough clients, and at home, she was going through a rough time.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Holiday Homicide
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey Abbondandolo investigate the cold-blooded killing of a tow truck business owner. Their investigation uncovers a twisted world of alleged abuse, infidelity, and a possible murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Backwater Bloodshed
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head into Louisiana to work with the Concordia Parish Sheriff's Office and investigate the 2016 homicide of a 26-year-old whose body was found on the banks of the bayou.

programme.title: Dateline: Over the Edge
programme.desc: It took 20 years to find out what happened to a woman out on an evening hike with her husband.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trap
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trap
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: Dateline: The Women and Dirty John

programme.title: Dateline: The Target
programme.desc: A luxury car salesman receives a visit from a beautiful former client. It turns out that she is not interested in buying a car, but in planning a murder. Andrea Canning reports on her twisted scheme, which shocks even the town's most seasoned detectives.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Murder in the Keys
programme.desc: Young newlyweds Michael and Susan 'Missy' MacIvor were living the dream in the Florida Keys with a baby on the way. But the Florida Man strikes in paradise, when under the cover of a storm, the MacIvors become victims of a triple homicide.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Killer Succession
programme.desc: A car bomb explodes rocking the millionaire enclave of Naples, Florida. Tobacco heiress Margaret Benson and her son are victims of a double homicide. Her severely injured daughter clings to life, and may be the police’s only hope for an eyewitness.

programme.title: Snapped: Shawna Nelson
programme.desc: Stay-at-home mom Shawna Nelson had been juggling three kids, a husband, and a married lover for months. When it became too much, police say she decided to get rid of one burden: her lover's wife.

programme.title: Snapped: Martha Freeman

programme.title: Snapped: Tyonne Palmer
programme.desc: A love triangle between a preacher, his son and his girlfriend ends in death.

programme.title: Snapped: Nicole Abusharif

programme.title: Snapped: Sheila Davalloo
programme.desc: A biochemist becomes obsessed with a co-worker and formulates a plot to eliminate his fiancée and her husband.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawn Silvernail
programme.desc: The murder of a church choir member uncovers a sordid secret and an unlikely love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped: Karen Newell
programme.desc: A roadside shooting leaves one man dead and exposes his wife’s wild double life.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Lorenzo's Oil? No, Linda's
programme.desc: Linda's new friend introduces her to essential oils and Aunt Gayle is convinced she must be rescued. Meanwhile, Bob and Teddy are bamboozled into performing a series of annoying favours for Mr. Huggins.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Helen Hunt
programme.desc: The Belchers make it their mission to help Teddy get his dream girl, but Tina is convinced she's found a better match for him.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Bed, Bob and Beyond
programme.desc: A Valentine's Day fight between Bob and Linda has the kids feeling confused. After a failed attempt to see a movie, it’s up to Tina, Louise and Gene to tell their own story as a distraction from the awkward tension.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Every Which Way But Goose
programme.desc: Tina, discouraged by not being asked to prom by Jimmy Jr., forms an unhealthy attachment to a goose from the nearby park. Meanwhile, Linda joins a dating app to help Gretchen find a match.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pal Stewie

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog
programme.desc: After Brian teases Stewie for being small, Stewie invents a shrinking machine that results in both of them shrinking to a microscopic size.

programme.title: Family Guy: Regarding Carter

programme.title: Family Guy: Stand by Meg
programme.desc: After Meg saves Stewie from a choking incident, Stewie makes it his personal mission to create a better life for Meg. Meanwhile, Chris is sent to a vocational school.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Griffin Winter Games
programme.desc: To the surprise of all the Griffins, Meg makes the U.S. Olympic team as a biathlete and competes in the Winter Olympics.

programme.title: Family Guy: Switch the Flip
programme.desc: To help get Brian's life in order, Stewie and Brian swap bodies using a machine that Stewie invents, but chaos quickly ensues around Quahog when the machine goes haywire.

programme.title: Family Guy: HTTPete

programme.title: Movie: Don't Breathe
